jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Wockhardt Hospitals
jsonLd.description:
Wockhardt Hospitals has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Wockhardt Hospitals:
Wockhardt Hospitals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wockhardt Hospitals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
